title: Burger Mod Fabricated
description: Autovw's Burger Mod ported to Fabric!
body:
Burger Mod

Autovw's Burger Mod ported to Fabric Forge version can be found here
  • 4 Meat burgers
  • 2 Fish burgers
  • Variants: Egg, Cheese and Champignon (Brown Mushroom)!
  • Golden burgers + Enchanted Golden Burger
  • Chicken nuggets, fries & more!
🍔 Recipes

Please Check out Autovw's Burger Mod Wiki for the recipes, or install REI!

📸 Images

The furniture in the picutre is Adorn! 

⚠️ WARNING! This mod should only be downloaded from the CurseForge page or Modrinth page, DO NOT reupload or download from any other source, as it may be harmful to your device!
